name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.16: deal stock + idle resolver now read current stock from the machine layout (planogram currStock) — the same source the catalog/expiry views use — instead of the slot_stock table, which is empty on machines that are not syncing. Fixes the deal editor showing "0 in stock" and expiry/markdown idle cards being dropped for in-stock products; price/name/image fall back to the layout when the catalog row has none. Builds on v5.15.
